business.name: Bloom & Vine Florist
business.tagline: Fresh, locally sourced arrangements for every occasion.
business.about: Bloom & Vine is a family-run florist creating seasonal bouquets, wedding flowers, and same-day delivery across the city. We work with local growers to bring you the freshest stems all year round.

services.name: Everyday bouquets
services.description: Hand-tied seasonal arrangements, ready for same-day pickup or delivery.

services.name: Weddings & events
services.description: Full-service floral design for ceremonies, receptions, and celebrations.

services.name: Subscriptions
services.description: Fresh flowers delivered to your home or office, weekly or monthly.

business.name: Northside Auto Repair
business.tagline: Honest, fast repairs from certified local mechanics.
business.about: Northside Auto Repair has kept the neighborhood on the road for over 20 years. From oil changes to full diagnostics, our ASE-certified technicians get you back on the road quickly and fairly.

services.name: Diagnostics
services.description: Computerized engine and electrical diagnostics with a clear, upfront quote.

services.name: Routine maintenance
services.description: Oil changes, brakes, tires, and scheduled service to keep your car running.

services.name: Repairs
services.description: Engine, transmission, and suspension repairs by certified technicians.
